checks.note: case has concrete steps, assertions, and harness requirements
every required harness has a named proof method and evidence
assertions include observable artifact/output outcomes
case declares trace, locking, versioning, checkpoint, or review behavior
chat/paste cases declare where results may land
case keeps source provenance instead of relying on unsupported memory
privacy-sensitive case states masking or boundary behavior
long-running case states checkpoint/resume/route audit behavior
private gold case keeps answer material outside public artifacts and grades modes separately

requirementProofs.method: Artifact ids and selected-room references must be canonical, clickable, and carried into tool context.
Mutating spreadsheet outputs must carry value, source/evidence, confidence, and status metadata.
Catalog cases must declare schema/layout failure modes before they can be promoted to runtime fixtures.
Cross-file cases must cite source artifact/sheet/row and declare non-conflation or conflict behavior.
Large, sparse, or multi-sheet catalog cases must declare retrieval/chunking semantics and not whole-file prompting.
Public/private boundaries and prompt-injection fencing are runtime tested; catalog cases must state masking rules.
Review-mode proposals and human approval paths are runtime tested; catalogs must state review conditions.

Long-running work must use agentJobs, checkpoints, route audit, and duplicate-write prevention.
Workflow state must be resumable and preserve unexecuted tool calls and receipts.
Every route proof records the resolved provider model instead of only the requested alias.
Wiki updates must be source-linked, idempotent, and respect public/private boundaries.
Review-mode proposals and human approval paths are runtime tested; catalogs must state review conditions.

requirementProofs.method: Artifact ids and selected-room references must be canonical, clickable, and carried into tool context.
Chat-started cases must declare intake modes, output surfaces, provenance strength, and ambiguity handling.
Entity cases must include ambiguity/duplicate/conflict assertions rather than single-name guessing.
Ambiguous chat-only cases must prove ask-or-review behavior before writes are considered complete.

Provider parse adapters have unit and smoke coverage; catalog rows state which layout failure they depend on.
Wiki updates must be source-linked, idempotent, and respect public/private boundaries.
Public/private boundaries and prompt-injection fencing are runtime tested; catalog cases must state masking rules.
Review-mode proposals and human approval paths are runtime tested; catalogs must state review conditions.

requirementProofs.method: Private gold workbooks run locally by content hash; committed evidence is redacted summaries only.
The answer key is grader-only and never included in model-visible prompt or public traces.
Formula judging checks structure, references, and tie-outs rather than exact pasted answer strings.
Formula-sensitive cases must declare dependency locks, formula preservation, or derived-cell review behavior.
Public/private boundaries and prompt-injection fencing are runtime tested; catalog cases must state masking rules.
Guide-mode catalogs must explicitly assert zero answer-cell writes and hint-first behavior.
Collaborate-mode catalogs must assert section leases, drafts when blocked, CAS on shared linkage rows, and human-edit preservation.
Workflow state must be resumable and preserve unexecuted tool calls and receipts.
Review-mode proposals and human approval paths are runtime tested; catalogs must state review conditions.
